items.title: Uganda suspends school trips after 20 pupils die in bus crash
items.summary: Thousands die on Uganda's roads each year but this is one of its deadliest incidents involving children.

items.title: Chinese-Russian Biologists Release Nearly 500,000 Young Sturgeon into the Amur River
items.summary: When the BBC visited China’s frigid northeastern province of Heilongjiang (Black Dragon River) in 2008 hoping to catch a glimpse of the river’s famous giant sturgeon, the English documentarians learne…
